# How to Grow Sweet Smelling Buds
by Nebula Haze
When it comes to growing cannabis, there are lots of things that affect the total experience. Although the “potency” is definitely important, the smell and taste of buds also change how buds make you feel. Sometimes you smell a strain of cannabis and your brain yells,”Yes!”
Grow a sweet smelling strain like [White Truffle Ice Cream](https://seedsupreme.com/white-truffle-ice-cream-feminized-seeds.html#grower) by Seed Supreme.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/colorful-glittery-bud.jpg)
There’s something about sweet-tasting cannabis that is just special and unique, and often these buds come with unique effects that you may not get from other buds.
So how do you grow a sweet-tasting strain? It’s actually pretty simple, but simple doesn’t always mean easy…
## 1.) Get a Sweet Smelling Cannabis Strain
Strain is the #1 thing you must pay attention to if you want to grow cannabis that actually smells sugary. See [examples](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-grow-sweet-smelling-buds#examples-famous-strains) of some popular sweet-smelling strains.
There are many strains that smell fruity or sweet, but if you are growing a strain that naturally smells skunky, like diesel, etc, there’s not necessarily a whole lot you can do during the growing process (besides using specialized supplements) to make the buds smell differently than their genes intend.
The smell of your buds is heavily dependent on the cannabis strain.
[Wedding Cake](https://seedsupreme.com/wedding-cake-feminized.html#grower) smells sweet and has beautiful effects. Grown by The Joint Fairy!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/wedding-cake-with-purple-scissor-hash-by-the-joint-fairy.jpg)​
[Learn more about researching the right cannabis strain for you](https://www.growweedeasy.com/find-strain).
## 2.) Sweetness-Boosting Supplements
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/long-thick-dense-cannabis-cola.jpg)There are many supplements that may be able to help make buds smell and taste more sweet. Some of them are specialty items that need to be found in a hydro store or bought online, but there are also ingredients you may have around the home that can also increase sweetness.
When it comes to nutrients and supplements, you have several choices that can help improve the overall scent of your buds. In fact, many products have been formulated specifically to increase and enhance the smell of cannabis buds.
Here’s what you need to keep in mind when it comes to nutrients and supplements…
**Sugar Based Supplements**
Many sugar or carbohydrate-based supplements claim to improve the smell/taste/sweetness of buds. A cheap alternative to expensive sugar-based bloom boosting supplements is [blackstrap molasses](https://www.amazon.com/Golden-Barrel-Blackstrap-Molasses-Packaging/dp/B000UCOQV2/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&qid=1525717296&sr=8-2&keywords=blackstrap+molasses+for+plants&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=3ef723637052d1e19c8b3df4d13ee87d). Giving this to your plants for the last few weeks before harvest can help them get bigger and smell/taste better.
It’s not specially made for plants; it’s the regular stuff you’ll find in your kitchen or at the grocery store). Blackstrap molasses adds sugars, amino acids and trace minerals. Unfortunately for hydro growers, anything organic like molasses is  _not_ suitable for a hydroponic reservoir. But molasses works great for soil and coco growers 🙂
For the last 2-3 weeks before harvest, give 1 tsp of Blackstrap Molasses per gallon when watering (for soil or coco coir)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2010/05/black-strap-molasses-can-be-used-to-help-promote-cannabis-flavor-and-density.jpg)
**Improve or Enhance Natural Bloom Processes**
This group of supplements contains ingredients that are meant to help the plant do its job better. In addition to carbohydrates or sugar, these types of supplements also contain extracts from plant, marine, and mineral sources, as well as things like vitamins, amino acids, polyflavonoids, etc.
The jury is still out and which is the  _most_ effective supplement, but many growers are happy with bloom-promoting supplements that include sources of…
  * amino acids
  * humic acids
  * vitamins
  * trace minerals
  * often contain unlisted ingredients (including plant hormones)

I personally don’t use this type of supplement so I can’t recommend a particular one, but some of the most popular cannabis supplements based on this type of formula include…
  * [Floralicious Plus](https://www.amazon.com/General-Hydroponics-Floralicious-Vitality-2-0-8-0-5/dp/B0CVNQFH6W?pd_rd_w=H2YT1&content-id=amzn1.sym.9023959a-379f-4911-bf85-9afa60b85373&pf_rd_p=9023959a-379f-4911-bf85-9afa60b85373&pf_rd_r=ACVEJGVHDPH8FCST44KK&pd_rd_wg=IfGkE&pd_rd_r=5083cd31-1af0-4cf2-b253-52c9e74b2992&pd_rd_i=B0CVNQFH6W&psc=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=784a99b9387c577b47ac8141c05a8f59&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (by General Hydroponics)
  * [Golden Tree](https://www.amazon.com/Humboldts-Secret-Golden-Tree-All/dp/B00T16TY6A?content-id=amzn1.sym.bf491aa8-b307-4a36-bb91-bc4611147923%3Aamzn1.sym.bf491aa8-b307-4a36-bb91-bc4611147923&crid=3EPIQFPWXGAJV&cv_ct_cx=foxfarm&keywords=foxfarm&pd_rd_i=B00IPU2UFU&pd_rd_r=116e15e2-533f-462c-8cd9-0f25688179e6&pd_rd_w=WKlLj&pd_rd_wg=fjOjT&pf_rd_p=bf491aa8-b307-4a36-bb91-bc4611147923&pf_rd_r=J78NBYRPWR7W9MMRY3XT&qid=1751762762&sbo=RZvfv%2F%2FHxDF%2BO5021pAnSA%3D%3D&sprefix=foxfarm%2Caps%2C155&sr=1-3-baa1f287-65d3-41a3-a655-8bbba0531537-spons&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9zZWFyY2hfdGhlbWF0aWM&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=79d06b4d72eb702f97854e4af0192f6b&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (by Humboldts Secret)
  * [Bushdoctor Bembé](https://www.amazon.com/Bushdoctor-Concentrate-Fast-Acting-Fertilizer-Sweetness/dp/B00K5BCOC6?crid=3EPIQFPWXGAJV&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.dFp6Ua3_MI327mzq8dwyOsaPT4803uRrz76km5WhUOrCNKOFaDeIoEYwu4qOVsdyO8gjPbMr7qjUvT9sToyOvy-ctYrgG5w5waWLaW6iqhKIOqMiYpU9fp1zOspJTD36ajRraMiVUJFkCrDzE3A0tjnDbH0xWfHmx2HuqRnzTBkSYTMpZlKCVcptytA2nkPL_VvCLNGyEXLpP90ksjbajWQs0c6xBYprUhf5bwWlgfkTea8k6A_zAmgmHQnQQPWSh29PiYBBqzA5kJgLQJpSPj6wTt0tSrHp2XI2mpPucJo.6W2TK4icX7KE7CaT4WDGYnYr75-Uw7T_kSetn31sf-4&dib_tag=se&keywords=foxfarm&qid=1751762762&sprefix=foxfarm%2Caps%2C155&sr=8-60&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=accae2d84e46c26144bc6dbe56e117e1&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (by Fox Farm)

**Note:** When possible, try to get all your nutrients and supplements from the same company. This greatly reduces the chance of getting unexpected reactions between the different products. Some companies don’t “play well” together.
[](https://www.amazon.com/General-Hydroponics-Floralicious-Vitality-2-0-8-0-5/dp/B0CVNQFH6W?pd_rd_w=H2YT1&content-id=amzn1.sym.9023959a-379f-4911-bf85-9afa60b85373&pf_rd_p=9023959a-379f-4911-bf85-9afa60b85373&pf_rd_r=ACVEJGVHDPH8FCST44KK&pd_rd_wg=IfGkE&pd_rd_r=5083cd31-1af0-4cf2-b253-52c9e74b2992&pd_rd_i=B0CVNQFH6W&psc=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=784a99b9387c577b47ac8141c05a8f59&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) [](https://www.amazon.com/Humboldts-Secret-Golden-Tree-All/dp/B00T16TY6A?content-id=amzn1.sym.bf491aa8-b307-4a36-bb91-bc4611147923%3Aamzn1.sym.bf491aa8-b307-4a36-bb91-bc4611147923&crid=3EPIQFPWXGAJV&cv_ct_cx=foxfarm&keywords=foxfarm&pd_rd_i=B00IPU2UFU&pd_rd_r=116e15e2-533f-462c-8cd9-0f25688179e6&pd_rd_w=WKlLj&pd_rd_wg=fjOjT&pf_rd_p=bf491aa8-b307-4a36-bb91-bc4611147923&pf_rd_r=J78NBYRPWR7W9MMRY3XT&qid=1751762762&sbo=RZvfv%2F%2FHxDF%2BO5021pAnSA%3D%3D&sprefix=foxfarm%2Caps%2C155&sr=1-3-baa1f287-65d3-41a3-a655-8bbba0531537-spons&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9zZWFyY2hfdGhlbWF0aWM&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=bc9542f3e13579df78f2efa36509f75d&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) [](https://www.amazon.com/Bushdoctor-Concentrate-Fast-Acting-Fertilizer-Sweetness/dp/B00K5BCOC6?crid=3EPIQFPWXGAJV&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.dFp6Ua3_MI327mzq8dwyOsaPT4803uRrz76km5WhUOrCNKOFaDeIoEYwu4qOVsdyO8gjPbMr7qjUvT9sToyOvy-ctYrgG5w5waWLaW6iqhKIOqMiYpU9fp1zOspJTD36ajRraMiVUJFkCrDzE3A0tjnDbH0xWfHmx2HuqRnzTBkSYTMpZlKCVcptytA2nkPL_VvCLNGyEXLpP90ksjbajWQs0c6xBYprUhf5bwWlgfkTea8k6A_zAmgmHQnQQPWSh29PiYBBqzA5kJgLQJpSPj6wTt0tSrHp2XI2mpPucJo.6W2TK4icX7KE7CaT4WDGYnYr75-Uw7T_kSetn31sf-4&dib_tag=se&keywords=foxfarm&qid=1751762762&sprefix=foxfarm%2Caps%2C155&sr=8-60&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=ec4e61f6ac972f7414c72d6a97da236c&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
**These supplements were developed specifically for enhancing plants like cannabis. Just be careful not to go overboard. And try to stick to the same company for all nutrients and supplements.**
The more types of supplements you use, the bigger the chance you might end up burning or causing a nutrient lockout problem with your plants. If possible, always try to use all supplements and nutrients from the same nutrient company. This lessens the chance of unwanted interactions since the whole line is designed to work together. When in doubt, go for an established nutrient company that has been around for years over one that has just appeared recently.
## 3.) Flush with Plain Water Before Harvest
If you’ve been using liquid or powder nutrients during the cannabis flowering stage, it’s good practice to “flush” your buds (give them only plain water with no nutrients) before harvest. This is especially important if you’ve been giving high levels of nutrients or supplements in the water.
The idea behind flushing before harvest is to give the plants some amount of time without any added nutrients in the days or weeks leading up to harvest. This allows the plant to “use up” all the extra nutrients in both the soil and within the plant itself. This may help prevent a “chemical” or “mineral” taste to buds caused by a concentration of nutrients in the plant tissue.
[Learn how to flush your cannabis before harvest](https://www.growweedeasy.com/flushing).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/watering-sour-diesel-plant.jpg)
## 4.) Don’t Let Grow Space Get Hot After Buds Have Formed
Don’t let the [temperature](https://www.growweedeasy.com/temperature) get over 75-80°F in the flowering stage and keep the temperature under 75°F during the drying process to prevent your plants from losing smell due to heat!
[Get 5 Tips for Controlling Heat](https://www.growweedeasy.com/5-secrets-cannabis-heat-control).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/07/heat-wave-light-stress-brown-curling-leaves.jpg)
## 5.) Proper Dry & Cure After Harvest
After waiting months to harvest your cannabis, it can be easy to skip the last step of preparing your buds after harvest, known as the “dry” and “cure” processes.
[Read the drying and curing tutorial](https://www.growweedeasy.com/drying-curing).
_Don’t skip this step!_ The drying/curing process has a huge effect on the final taste, smell and overall smoothness of your cannabis buds.
The main idea is to dry buds slowly after harvest, and then keep them stored in jars for 2-4 weeks. This triggers natural processes that dramatically increase the overall smell and taste of your buds, and also makes buds actually feel more potent.
[More tips on drying and curing](https://www.growweedeasy.com/tips-tricks-curing-cannabis).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/harvest-in-jars.jpg)
## 6.) Keep Plants Healthy Throughout the Flowering Stage
I know it can be lame to hear that something as simple as keeping your cannabis plant healthy will make a positive difference in your results. I’m sure you probably have already knew that.
But it’s important to understand what is happening [week by week](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-flowering-stage) during the flowering stage so you can spot problems and fix them before they affect your harvest.
The main goal is to keep your cannabis plants green and healthy throughout most of the flowering stage. When leaves and buds get burned or otherwise damaged from nutrient deficiencies, heat stress and other problems, the overall smell and sweetness of your buds may suffer.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/09/flowering-marijuana-plants-315-cmh-grow-light.jpg)
##  Examples of Strains with Famous Smells
Some popular sweet-smelling strains include…
**[Pineapple Chunk](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/pineapple-chunk/ref/63951/)** (by Barneys Farm)
A lot of the time when someone says a strain smells like a fruit, they mean that you’ll get  _small hints_ of that smell in the undertones. With Pineapple Chunk the buds actually smell sweet, and some really do smell quite a bit like pineapple.
Although not the highest yielding, this strain produces buds that always get a surprising number of positive comments about the taste and smell, and the bud effects are very smooth.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2010/05/frosty-cannabis-pineapple-chunk-cola.jpg)
You will be able to start smelling the pineapple when the plant is still in the flowering stage, but the smell is most pronounced after the buds have been dried and cured.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2010/05/pineapple-chunk-cannabis-in-grow-tent.jpg)
Example of a high-yielding [Pineapple Chunk](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/pineapple-chunk/ref/63951/) plant I grew in a [mini tent](https://www.growweedeasy.com/mini-grow-tent-shopping-list-tutorial-100w-led-grow-light).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/crazy-pineapple-chunk-cannabis-plant-grown-under-hlg-leds-with-tons-of-white-pistils-sm.jpg)
[**Super Lemon Haze**](https://seedsupreme.com/super-lemon-haze-feminized.html#grower) (by Greenhouse Seeds)
Smells lemony, and certain plants will end up smelling just like a Lemonhead with a mix of citrus, sour and sweet. The potency is surprisingly strong, energetic and creative, perfect for daytime use. Doesn’t usually cause ‘couchlock’ so many people like this strain for daytime use.
Here is an example of a room full of Super Lemon Haze plants
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2010/05/super-lemon-haze-cannabis-grow-room.jpg)
…and a Super Lemon Haze cola
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2010/05/super-lemon-haze-cola.jpg)
_Bonus Sweet Photoperiod Strain_
**[Candy Games #38](https://seedsupreme.com/candy-games-38-feminized-cannabis-seeds.html#grower) **(by Happy Valley Genetics)
This strain grows unique looking buds that take on a purple hue, excellent potency, and the smell is sugary sweet. Almost like cotton candy on some plants.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/candy-games-38-cannabis-strain-happy-valley-genetics-ethos.jpg)
**Autoflowering Strains**
[Auto-flowering strains](https://www.growweedeasy.com/5-tips-for-growing-autoflowering-cannabis-strains-get-bigger-yields-more-thc) can be easier to grow in some ways, and both of these auto-flowering strains take less than 3 months from seed to you actually smoking bud!
**[Blue AutoMazar](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/blue-mazar-auto-feminised-seeds-dp-blue-automazar?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64)** (by Dutch Passion) – A cross between two autoflowering strains from breeder Dutch Passion, this strain is as much about taste and smell as it is about potency.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2010/05/blue-automazar-just-before-harvest.jpg)
[_**Banana Purple Punch Auto**_](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/new-banana-purple-punch-auto/ref/63951/) – This autoflowering strain is ready to harvest as soon as 60 days from germination, but the real fruity candy smell and higher bud potency happen if you let the plant go a bit longer to 65 or 70 days.
Example of a [_Banana Purple Punch Auto_](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/new-banana-purple-punch-auto/ref/63951/) bud in its full sweet-smelling glory.
[](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/new-banana-purple-punch-auto/ref/63951/)
_Bonus Sweet Autoflowering Strain_
  * [Gushers Auto](https://seedsupreme.com/gushers-autoflower-seeds.html#grower) – A candy-smelling autoflowering strain that’s ready to harvest a little over two months from germination. Candy-smelling weed for the busy grower.
  * [Pineapple Daddy Auto](https://seedsupreme.com/pineapple-daddy-autoflower-cannabis-seeds.html#grower) – Over 30% THC, and one of the highest-potency autos available (as of 2025). Buds smell and look delicious. Pictures coming soon!

[Read a tutorial on how to grow auto-flowering cannabis plants exactly like these ones](https://www.growweedeasy.com/250w-hps-beginner-tutorial).

GrowWeedEasy.com was [founded in 2010](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about) by Nebula Haze and Sirius Fourside. Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home. Our simple step-by-step tutorials make it easy for anyone to grow great weed. **[Sign up for our free newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news)** to get grow tips delivered every Sunday at 4:20 AM.
